nodes.name: Slow start
nodes.truth: Window grows exponentially until ssthresh or loss.

nodes.name: Congestion window
nodes.truth: Sender-side limit on in-flight unacknowledged data, adjusted per feedback.

nodes.name: ssthresh
nodes.truth: Threshold where growth switches from exponential to linear.

nodes.name: Congestion avoidance
nodes.truth: Above ssthresh the window grows additively, roughly one MSS per RTT.

nodes.name: Packet loss as congestion signal
nodes.truth: Loss (timeout or dup ACKs) is interpreted as network congestion.

nodes.name: Fast retransmit
nodes.truth: Three duplicate ACKs trigger retransmission before the timeout fires.

nodes.name: Fast recovery
nodes.truth: After fast retransmit, halve the window and continue in congestion avoidance instead of restarting slow start.

nodes.name: AIMD
nodes.truth: Additive increase, multiplicative decrease — the fairness/stability core of TCP.
